    Class Description
    BobaShopGUI
    Main GUI application for the Team 81 Boba Shop Point-of-Sale (POS) system.
    BobaShopGUI.CartItem <<<<<<< Updated upstream
    Represents a single item in the shopping cart with a name, unit price, and quantity.
    =======
    Simple data holder representing a single item in the cashier's shopping cart.
    >>>>>>> Stashed changes
    DatabaseManager <<<<<<< Updated upstream
    Manages the database connection to the PostgreSQL server using the Singleton pattern.
    =======
    Manages a singleton database connection to the team's PostgreSQL database hosted on AWS.
